heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1316 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1978— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted reference to ten institutions referred to in last sentence of and substituted provisions authorizing appropriations for each fiscal year thereafter through the fiscal year ending before , for provisions authorizing appropriations each fiscal year thereafter through the fiscal year ending , and added subsec. amendments: Amendments1978— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted reference to ten institutions referred to in last sentence of and substituted provisions authorizing appropriations for each fiscal year thereafter through the fiscal year ending before , for provisions authorizing appropriations each fiscal year thereafter through the fiscal year ending , and added subsec. children.label: a
children.text: For the ten institutions referred to in the last sentence of , there are authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $30,000,000 for the fiscal year ending (including the cost of construction, equipment, and startup expenses), and not to exceed $7,500,000 for the fiscal year 1980 and for each fiscal year thereafter through the fiscal year ending before Octo­ber 1, 1984, to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.section 1311(a) of this titleSeptember 30, 1979

children.label: b
children.text: For the three remaining institutions referred to in the last sentence of , there are authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $6,500,000 for the fiscal year 1980 (including the cost of construction, equipment, and startup expenses), and not to exceed $2,000,000 for each fiscal year after fiscal year 1980 ending before , to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.section 1311(a) of this titleOctober 1, 1984
